idea-plugin.name: ObservaAI
idea-plugin.description:
Real-time AI cost and token monitoring inside your JetBrains IDE.

ObservaAI sits between your code and AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, OpenRouter) and tracks every token, dollar, and millisecond of latency — live.

Features

  • Live Metrics tool window — tokens, cost, latency, per-provider breakdown, budget alerts
  • Status bar widget — ⬡ 12.3K · $0.04 always-visible counter; click to open tool window
  • Budget alerts — IDE balloon notifications when you approach or exceed a spending limit
  • Multi-workspace support — team API key scopes all telemetry to a named workspace
  • Dark and light theme — automatically matches your IDE theme

Quick setup

  1. Run the ObservaAI gateway: cd ObservaAI && make dev
  2. Point your AI SDK at the gateway: base_url="http://localhost:8000/proxy/openai/v1"
  3. Configure gateway URL in Settings → Tools → ObservaAI (default: http://localhost:8000)

See the Beginner Guide for full instructions.

Supported providers

OpenAI · Anthropic · Google Gemini · Ollama · OpenRouter
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0
  • Live Metrics tool window with per-provider breakdown and budget alert cards
  • Status bar widget showing live token count and cost
  • Budget alert balloon notifications with deduplication
  • Multi-workspace team API key support
  • Settings page under Tools → ObservaAI
